text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the JBC Classic is here. In this race,
Copano Rickey will go up against two titans of
the dirt track, Hokko Tarumae and Wonder
Acute.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's still early for the fall-winter season, so it's
likely that the two won't expend their full power
quite yet. This may be Copano Rickey's chance to
squeeze out a victory.
